changes.before: Better paper than the road deserved.
changes.after: Better paper than a road dispatch usually got.

changes.before: "Then home had better learn to ride farther."
The road narrowed into the kind of track merchants still used because trade had made it, not because any lord cared to keep it easy.
changes.after: The road narrowed into the kind of track merchants still used because merchants had worn it in, not because any lord cared to keep it easy.

changes.before: Behind them Stratholme kept its place in the sky as long as the dark allowed.
changes.after: Behind them Stratholme's stain stayed in the sky as long as the dark allowed.

changes.before: That landed. Vereesa flinched in the eyes only.
The pause told its own story in front of everyone listening.
That landed. Vereesa flinched in the eyes only.
The younger sister sat above them with the camp behind and the northern road at her back, everything she'd ridden here to save already lost.
changes.after: The younger sister sat above them with the camp behind and the northern road at her back.

changes.before: The kind that stripped everything down to function.
